name: SecurityLocalGetFreshness
title: SecurityLocalGetFreshness
syntax: long SecurityLocalGetFreshness(char freshnessIdentifierString[], dword freshnessValueId, byte freshnessData[], dword freshnessDataLength)
description: Gets the freshness value for the specified Id.

As freshness values differs from Security Source to Security Source you have to refer to the Security Source specific manual to get more information about which values you have to specify as parameters.

parameters.name: char freshnessIdentifierString[]
parameters.description: A string as an identifier for the freshness to get.

return: A Value of 1 means that the action was successful. A value less than or equal to 0 means error.
